store_headline: WordPress Theme for Filmmakers and Video Agencies
store_subheadline: Build a cinematic portfolio site with video galleries, portfolio layouts, and a built-in WooCommerce store.
features: Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value) included
Wolf Visual Composer extension with custom video elements
Portfolio functionality for showcasing creative work
Wolf Videos for optimal video management
Video thumbnail generator for professional previews
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Multiple blog layout options for video content
Social sharing integration across multiple platforms
Customized video embedding and player options
selling_points: The only filmmaking portfolio theme in the catalog — built for directors and video agencies
Full-screen video reel integration that turns your homepage into a showreel
Cinematic dark aesthetic modeled on the visual language of professional film — letterbox layout and credits-style typography
Portfolio layouts purpose-built for video project case studies, not repurposed from photography templates
WooCommerce for service packages — sell production retainers, license fees, or post-production packages directly
Wolf Videos keeps your entire reel organized and categorized across genres and clients
Distinct from MegaHertz — Superflick targets working film pros and agencies, not YouTube personalities
One-click demo import sets up a complete filmmaker site in minutes
key_benefits: Build a portfolio that stops a creative director mid-scroll
Showcase client work, branded films, and commercial reels in one gallery
Launch a cinematic agency site with a built-in dark film aesthetic
Sell production packages and service tiers directly through WooCommerce
Convert inquiries with portfolio case studies that walk prospects through your process
Attract high-budget clients by presenting your work at a professional level
design_features: Multiple header styles with video options
Professional film and video portfolio templates

testimonials.text: I first chose this theme for the quality of the design, the numerous display possibilities, the nice integration of videos. Then I was very happy with the technical support which is very competent and reactive, always there to help me implement my ideas and I am very demanding.
testimonials.author: Pierre_Wolff

testimonials.text: This theme was very easy to get up and running and easy to customize both through the WP admin and through code. Looks great.
testimonials.author: wordsmithadvertising

testimonials.text: Amazing theme! i'm very happy with it and hope they will continue updating it for a very long time :)
testimonials.author: marcangele
